docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEAS, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEAS, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $645.00, THE PLAINTIFF EXPRESSLY TOLD THE DEFENDANT NOT TO CALL 911. SHE IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE FEES FROM SFFD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY MEAS, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-22-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-15-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER SC-152(ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL) APPROVED**
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GUTHNER, JULIANA
ORDER - THIS CASE NEEDS TO BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS CSM-23-866745 REFILE YOUR REQUEST ALONG WITH A REQUEST TO CONTINUE CSM-23-866745.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER MEAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIANA GUTHNER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLIVA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
